message:
fix(command): prevent panic on negative numkeys in ZDIFF/ZINTER/ZUNION/ZDIFFSTORE

parse_i64_arg(...) as usize silently wraps negative values to huge usize,
causing index-out-of-bounds panics. Added explicit negative checks before
the cast for:
- ZDIFF, ZINTER, ZUNION (numkeys at argv[1])
- ZDIFFSTORE (numkeys at argv[2])
- BLMPOP/BZMPOP COUNT (negative count now rejected instead of wrapping)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
